description:
A build tool for Scala, Java, and more


🐛 bug fixes
- fix: Fixes remote cache ByteStream timeout by @yhefamly in #9413
- fix: Fixes metabuild dependency downgrade via plugin by @anatoliykmetyuk in #9426
- fix: Fixes build pipelining by @anatoliykmetyuk in #9425
- fix: Fixes auto import of givens by @xuwei-k in #9409
- fix: Fixes sbtn stdout relaying by @BrianHotopp in #9411 / #9414
- fix: Fixes shutdownall in sbt runner by @eed3si9n in #9435
- fix: Fixes attribute string in pom.xml to be deterministic @raboof in sbt/ivy#51
- fix: Fixes ivyless publishing of sbt plugins by @anatoliykmetyuk in #9416
updates
- Deprecate url(...) and Resolver.url(...) in favor of uri(...) by @eed3si9n in #9420
- Tweak server startup message by @eed3si9n in #9429
- ipcsocket 1.8.0 by @eed3si9n in #9436
